---
title: "Srikanth's Dev Journal"
listing:
  contents: 
    - posts
    - notebooks
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero-intro}
<img src="images/avatar.png" alt="Srikanth's Avatar" class="hero-avatar">
<div class="hero-greeting">👋 Hey, I'm Srikanth</div>
<h1 class="hero-title">My Dev Journal</h1>
<p class="hero-subtitle">I write about what I learn every day — Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Engineering, and whatever rabbit hole I fall into. Think of this as my public notebook.</p>
<div class="hero-tags">
<span class="hero-tag">🧠 ML / AI</span>
<span class="hero-tag">🔬 Data Science</span>
<span class="hero-tag">🐍 Python</span>
<span class="hero-tag">📊 Statistics</span>
<span class="hero-tag">⚙️ Engineering</span>
</div>
<div class="hero-socials">
<a href="https://github.com/smsrikanthreddy" target="_blank" class="hero-social-link"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a href="https://twitter.com/smsrikanthreddy" target="_blank" class="hero-social-link"><i class="bi bi-twitter"></i> Twitter</a>
<a href="about.qmd" class="hero-social-link"><i class="bi bi-person"></i> More About Me</a>
</div>
:::

<div class="section-divider">
<span class="section-label">📝 Latest Posts</span>
</div>
